title: euphorbia × lomi
intro: Euphorbia × lomi, also known as the Hawaiian poinciana or fire on the mountain, is a rare and endangered succulent plant that belongs to the Euphorbiaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Euphorbia × lomi include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and fighting off infections, making it a valuable herb for natural remedies. Euphorbia × lomi can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
